titleStmt.title: SII 9.342: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 342. (A.R. No. 449 of 1914.) ON ANOTHER PILLAR IN THE SAME PLACE.

summary.p: This record is of the same date and belongs to the same king as No. 447 of 1914. It mentions the same personages. The god for whose service gadyāṇa 1 and paṇas 10 were granted is Kōḍiya-Sōmanāthadēva at Sōge.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśca . śrīmatpratāpacakrava
rtti hoysaṇavīranārasiṁhadēvavarṣada 6 neya bya
yasauṁtsarada caitra suddha 10 sōmavāradaṁdu śrīma
nmahāpradhānaṁ rāyabhūbaḷagajāṁkuśaṁ vijayavinō
di bommayada(ṁ)ṇnāyakara besadiṁ gōparasa būtarasa tigaṭeyya
nadēvayya maṁgaṭeya dēvayyaṁgaḷappaṇeyiṁ śrīmatu pāṁḍyanāḍa
suṁkādhikāri siripaṇnamaylāradēva divakaradēva mallaya heggaḍegaḷu sō
geya kōḍiya śrīsōmanāthadēvara raṁgabhōganivēdyakaṁ biṭṭa dattiyā
pāṁḍyanāḍa paḍikēṇiya sthaḷada kōgaḷināḍa davasāyadoḷage vari
śaṁprati nibaṁdhavāgi saluva gadyāṇa 1 pa 5 yā bilukoḍeyadhi
kāri bopeyyadaṁṇnāyakara heggaḍe hariya(ṁ)ṇnaṁgaḷappaṇeyiṁ he
ggaḍe dēvayya koṁmayya nellakūḷa mādayyagaḷu yā dava
sāyadalu koṭṭa pa 5 Āvadhikāri baṁdaḍaṁ kēṇivoḷageḷihi pra
tipāḷisuvaru �yo dharmmavanu pāḷisuvaru pāḷisididdaḍe vāraṇā
siĀlu kavileya koṁdaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.342 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
